introSection: Loop Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at CJ Barrymore's Family Entertainment Center in Clinton, Michigan, USA. Built by Pinfari, it originally opened in 1996 at Playland's Castaway Cove and was the only inverting roller coaster at the park. It was removed in 2015 along with the Flitzer to make way for GaleForce, a launched roller coaster from S&S Worldwide. The roller coaster was then purchased by CJ Barrymore's, where it reopened on May 9, 2016. The ride was listed for sale in 2024. In late 2025 it was announced that the roller coaster would reopen at Swampy Jack's Wongo Adventure in Florida where it is set to open in 2026.

sections.title: Layout
sections.content: The ride has a single tall vertical loop. It has two stations, one for loading and one for off-loading. It also has a transfer track.

fullText:
Loop Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at CJ Barrymore's Family Entertainment Center in Clinton, Michigan, USA. Built by Pinfari, it originally opened in 1996 at Playland's Castaway Cove and was the only inverting roller coaster at the park. It was removed in 2015 along with the Flitzer to make way for GaleForce, a launched roller coaster from S&S Worldwide. The roller coaster was then purchased by CJ Barrymore's, where it reopened on May 9, 2016. The ride was listed for sale in 2024. In late 2025 it was announced that the roller coaster would reopen at Swampy Jack's Wongo Adventure in Florida where it is set to open in 2026.





Blue track and white supports.

Cyan track and white supports.

The ride has a single tall vertical loop. It has two stations, one for loading and one for off-loading. It also has a transfer track.

Old-style trains.
